# Md. Sohel Rana

> Founder & CEO of NerdDevs Ltd, and an AI & SaaS Architect / Full-Stack Engineer based in Dhaka, Bangladesh, with 19+ years in software engineering. He leads a 20+ engineer team building AI-driven products, scalable SaaS platforms, and EdTech systems for clients across Asia, Europe, and North America.

Md. Sohel Rana architected Genius AI (100K+ users), a US messaging platform delivering 5M+ texts/month, Biddaan (a multi-vendor EdTech LMS used by 1,000+ educators in Bangladesh), and led engineering for TestReach, the remote-proctored exam platform trusted by ACCA and British Council for high-stakes professional exams.

## Key facts

- Name: Md. Sohel Rana
- Role: Founder & CEO, NerdDevs Ltd · AI & SaaS Architect · Full-Stack Engineer
- Location: Dhaka, Bangladesh (UTC+6)
- Experience: 19+ years in software engineering
- Company: NerdDevs Ltd (founded 2015), 27+ long-term projects across 6+ countries, 20+ engineers
- Education: B.Sc. in Computer Science & Engineering, Rajshahi University of Engineering & Technology (RUET), 2003–2007
- Contact: sohel@nerddevs.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mdsohelrana
- GitHub: https://github.com/sohel-rana
- Company site: https://nerddevs.com

## Notable projects

- Genius — AI Chat 5.0: GPT-4/5 and Vision-powered AI chat app, 100K+ sign-ups in three weeks, 99.9% uptime.
- US Messaging Platform: Anonymous-SMS consumer app delivering 5M+ texts/month on queue-driven, auto-scaling AWS infrastructure.
- Biddaan: Localized multi-vendor EdTech LMS for coaching centers and trainers in Bangladesh, 1,000+ educators onboarded.
- TestReach: Secure online assessment platform with remote proctoring, trusted by ACCA, British Council and CIPS for millions of high-stakes exams.
- AI Mate: Consumer AI assistant powered by GPT-5, 100K+ downloads, 4.5★ rating.
- NerdCRM: A $4/seat CRM for phone-heavy sales teams with auto-linked call recording and cold-email sequencing.
- DailyHabitz: iOS habit tracker with AI-powered micro-coaching, 5.0★ App Store rating.

## Site pages

- [Homepage](https://mdsohelrana.com/): Full profile, work history, skills, and NerdDevs overview.
- [Blog](https://mdsohelrana.com/blog): Field notes on AI product development, SaaS architecture, EdTech, cloud infrastructure and engineering leadership.

## Blog posts

- [Why We Rebuilt Our AI Chat Pipeline for Scale](https://mdsohelrana.com/blog/genius-ai-scale-lessons): Lessons from Genius AI's first 100K users and what broke, held, and changed at scale.
- [The Hidden Complexity of SMS at Scale](https://mdsohelrana.com/blog/sms-at-scale-hidden-complexity): Notes on idempotency, dead-letter handling, and carrier reality from delivering 5M+ texts/month.
- [From Idea to 1,000 Educators: Building Biddaan](https://mdsohelrana.com/blog/building-biddaan-edtech-bangladesh): What building a localized multi-vendor LMS taught about EdTech in Bangladesh.
- [TDD Isn't Slower — It's a Different Kind of Fast](https://mdsohelrana.com/blog/tdd-different-kind-of-fast): Why test-driven development still leads after 19+ years and real production incidents.
- [Choosing Between AWS, Azure, and GCP](https://mdsohelrana.com/blog/choosing-aws-azure-gcp): A founder's practical framework for picking a cloud provider.
- [2026 Predictions: Where AI Product Development Is Actually Heading](https://mdsohelrana.com/blog/ai-product-development-2026): An honest read on AI product trends from someone shipping AI features in production.
- [Why Every SaaS Founder Needs to Understand Their Own Database](https://mdsohelrana.com/blog/saas-founders-know-your-database): Why understanding your data model matters for product and pricing decisions.
- [Remote Proctoring at Scale: Engineering Trust Into High-Stakes Exams](https://mdsohelrana.com/blog/remote-proctoring-engineering-trust): What building trust into remote assessment infrastructure requires, from TestReach.
- [The Multi-Tenant Trap](https://mdsohelrana.com/blog/multi-tenant-trap): Multi-tenant SaaS architecture decisions that are hard to undo, from Biddaan and NerdCRM.
- [Hiring Engineers Who Ship](https://mdsohelrana.com/blog/hiring-engineers-who-ship): What leading a 20+ person engineering org predicts about who ships reliably.
- [Cold Email Still Works — If Your Product Team Builds It Right](https://mdsohelrana.com/blog/cold-email-still-works-nerdcrm): What building cold-email sequencing into NerdCRM taught about outreach that works.
- [AI Coaching in Consumer Apps](https://mdsohelrana.com/blog/ai-coaching-consumer-retention): What DailyHabitz taught about retention through personalized AI micro-coaching.
